title: Supervisor Workbench
subtitle: The Supervisor only proposes — changes land only after human sign-off; dangerous actions run only from the authed UI

inbox.countNote: {mine} pending you can sign · {others} for other roles (dimmed)

detail.none: Select a proposal from the list on the left
detail.targetHint: — click to open the entry in the knowledge workshop
detail.readOnly: This case is signed by {signer} — your role ({role}) is read-only
detail.expiredNote: Expired proposals cannot be signed — audit only
detail.supersedePre: This proposal is expired — auto-superseded when newer evidence appeared; replaced by
detail.supersedePost: (same topic, newer evidence). No zombie proposals.
detail.supersedeNoRef: This proposal is expired — superseded by a newer proposal; audit only
detail.lifecycleNote: Approval enters a waiting-for-human state; the Supervisor writes verification results back to this row

actions.commitNote: Approval applies the change immediately (DB write)

typeDesc.CORRECT: rewrite a draft correction into a clean lesson
typeDesc.PROMOTE: distil into durable domain / procedure knowledge
typeDesc.DOC_REVISE: block doc revision draft (does not touch the doc directly)

what.docDraft: revised draft kept on the proposal row — block docs untouched

digest.hint: Periodic reports (weekly / daily) are produced by the W2 scheduler and will appear here

audit.lifecycle: One row per case · propose → sign-off → land → verify lifecycle
